problem_statement: Write solve(intervals) to return the minimum number of rooms needed for half-open intervals (start, end). Intervals that touch at an endpoint may use the same room. Handle an empty list.
reference_solution:
def solve(intervals):
    active = []
    maximum = 0
    for start, end in sorted(intervals):
        active = [finish for finish in active if finish > start]
        active.append(end)
        maximum = max(maximum, len(active))
    return maximum
